title: Product
description: Product Master v1 contract for the product governance chain: SKU canonical, ingredient canonical, G1 formula, recipe, BOM, formula version, BOM snapshot, operational configs, and activation dependency.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Product Master and TECH-02. TODO: source documents do not provide a final product category code list.

product_code.description: Canonical product code. TODO: confirm product code format from source documents.

public_name.description: Public-facing product name when different from canonical name.

product_group.description: Product group from the 20 SKU catalog when available.

activation_id.description: Linked Product Activation record, if activation has been prepared.
